APPEAL OF CRIMINAL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2020 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: Appellants attorney, Ean Vizzi, was not present. Appearance was waived via email. Respondents attorney, Maria Shih was present in court. Matters submitted.

APPEAL OF CRIMINAL JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES: Counsel for Appellant did not appear, and Counsel for Respondent, Allison G. Macbeth did appear. Matters submitted.
